# Lost Gift Cards

If you lose your Acme Shop gift card, replacement is possible under certain conditions. You must provide proof of purchase, such as a receipt or confirmation email, and the original payment method. Registering your gift card on the website simplifies the process, allowing easier verification of details. To request a replacement, contact customer support, which may take up to 10 business days to process. A $5 processing fee may apply, and additional verification may be required in specific cases, such as promotional gift cards or cards with partial usage.

[Source: gift_cards.md#lost-gift-cards]
